title: FortuneWander
summary: A bespoke WordPress travel portal featuring an editorial theme with fluid Swup.js page transitions and a custom AI Travel Consultant plugin powered by Google Gemini 2.5 Flash.
subtitle: Editorial Travel Portal & AI Itinerary Assistant
overview: A high-end editorial travel portal built for WordPress, pairing a cinematic SPA-like frontend theme with a custom AI Travel Consultant plugin. Powered by Google Gemini 2.5 Flash with search grounding, the system generates structured day-by-day itineraries, custom HTML travel reports, and PDF downloads, while maintaining strict domain guardrails and smooth inertial scrolling.
challenge: Develop a cinematic SPA travel theme while engineering a secure, real-time AI Chatbot plugin that renders structured HTML itineraries in WordPress without compromising security.
solution: Integrated Swup.js & Lenis for fluid theme transitions and built an object-oriented WordPress AI plugin with custom HTML sanitization, secure REST API endpoints, and a lightweight floating widget.
process: Engineered an object-oriented WordPress AI plugin, establishing secure custom REST API endpoints authenticated via nonce verification.
Integrated Google Gemini 2.5 Flash with search grounding to generate real-time destination advice, packing recommendations, and structured day-by-day HTML itineraries.
Built a lightweight, zero-framework floating chat widget featuring markdown rendering, dynamic prompt chips, live status indicators, and client-side PDF export.
Integrated a modern Vite build pipeline into WordPress for modular JS/CSS bundling, combined with Swup.js and Lenis for smooth SPA routing and inertial scrolling.

challenges.title: HTML Sanitization vs. Rich AI Itinerary Table Layouts
challenges.solution: Standard WordPress sanitization strips custom CSS classes and structured table layouts returned by the AI, breaking complex itinerary layouts. Developed a custom whitelist-based HTML sanitizer to explicitly permit structural UI tags and styling attributes, enabling rich visual reports while enforcing strict XSS security.

challenges.title: API Rate-Limiting & Multi-Turn Conversation Memory
challenges.solution: Preventing API quota exhaustion while preserving conversation context was achieved by implementing transient-based rate-limiting per IP, paired with client-side session storage for multi-turn dialogue context.

challenges.title: Decoupled WordPress Build & Asset Pipeline
challenges.solution: Bridging modern frontend build tools with WordPress required writing a custom PHP asset loader to dynamically parse build manifests and enqueue cache-busted modules, eliminating core render-blocking styles.

inspiration: Inspired by editorial travel magazines and intelligent concierge systems, combining high-resolution photography with instant AI-driven itinerary generation.

title: Zola Sky System
summary: A real-time weather visualization platform transforming atmospheric data into high-performance visual representations.
vision: Zola Sky System is designed to present meteorological data through a dynamic, programmatic interface. The application ingests real-time API data and uses WebGL to generate responsive, data-driven visual conditions.
process: Architected a continuous data flow pipeline from external weather APIs to a custom WebGL rendering engine.
Developed procedural shaders to translate humidity and pressure metrics into visual cloud formations.
Implemented an accurate color grading system based on atmospheric scattering models.
Optimized the rendering loop to guarantee 60fps performance across diverse mobile hardware.

challenges.title: Mobile GPU Performance
challenges.solution: Initial shaders exceeded mobile GPU constraints. Implemented an adaptive quality degradation system that profiles device capabilities and gracefully falls back to a particle-based renderer, ensuring a stable 60fps.

challenges.title: Real-time Data Synchronization
challenges.solution: Strict API rate limits conflicted with the requirement for live updates. Built a MongoDB-backed caching layer that intelligently polls external APIs based on active user sessions, serving stale-while-revalidate data to maintain apparent real-time responsiveness.

inspiration: Architected around data precision and high-performance graphics, optimizing for both aesthetic delivery and system efficiency.

title: Neon Typewriter
summary: An interactive poetry generator that processes user input cadence in real-time to dynamically produce complementary text.
vision: Neon Typewriter explores real-time human-computer interaction by mapping keystroke telemetry to text generation. The system processes typing speed, rhythm, and pauses to conditionally trigger complementary generation.
process: Developed a responsive front-end interface leveraging React and the Canvas API.
Trained and deployed a Markov chain model using public domain text datasets.
Engineered a rhythm analysis module that maps real-time keystroke timing to generation parameters.
Optimized Canvas rendering pipelines using layered CSS filters and optimized draw calls.

challenges.title: Low-latency Generation
challenges.solution: Standard Markov generation introduced unacceptable latency and coherence issues. Developed a sliding context window to feed state into the model and implemented a pre-evaluation threshold to silently regenerate low-confidence outputs before rendering.

inspiration: Built to demonstrate real-time input processing and low-latency algorithmic response.

title: Concrete Garden
summary: A high-performance e-commerce storefront for an independent plant retailer featuring a custom design system.
vision: Concrete Garden delivers a reliable, robust e-commerce experience. The architecture focuses on component reusability, accessibility compliance, and seamless checkout integrations while maintaining a strict, non-traditional visual aesthetic.
process: Conducted extensive user research to inform the information architecture and conversion flow.
Designed and implemented a comprehensive component library using React and CSS Modules.
Integrated the Stripe API for secure, state-managed payment processing.
Optimized bundle size and asset delivery for rapid page loads.

challenges.title: Accessibility Compliance
challenges.solution: Brutalist design paradigms often conflict with WCAG guidelines. Iterated on color contrast ratios and form label visibility to guarantee full AA compliance without compromising the intended aesthetic.

inspiration: Designed with an emphasis on component modularity and resilient layout architecture.

title: Echo Loop
summary: A collaborative, real-time music sequencing application supporting concurrent multi-user interaction.
vision: Echo Loop is a distributed, real-time state synchronization application. It allows multiple concurrent users to manipulate a shared 16-step audio sequencer grid, requiring precise latency management and state reconciliation.
process: Engineered the core step sequencer logic utilizing the Web Audio API.
Designed a custom WebSocket protocol for sub-100ms state synchronization across distributed clients.
Implemented deterministic conflict resolution algorithms for concurrent state mutations.
Developed a read-only spectator mode for passive users.

challenges.title: Distributed Clock Synchronization
challenges.solution: Network latency and independent audio clocks caused drift. Developed a master-clock election protocol that establishes a tempo authority, allowing clients to interpolate positions and smooth out network jitter.

challenges.title: Audio Render Dropping
challenges.solution: React state reconciliations during WebSocket broadcasts introduced audio artifacts. Decoupled the visual state from the Web Audio scheduler, utilizing ref-based snapshots to update audio parameters without triggering React re-renders.

inspiration: Engineered to solve complex real-time synchronization and low-latency audio scheduling across distributed clients.

title: Paper Trail
summary: A performant reading application optimized for long-form content, featuring offline caching and custom physics.
vision: Paper Trail is a progressive web application designed to deliver an exceptional reading experience. It focuses on typography, custom interaction physics, and robust offline capabilities for uninterrupted access.
process: Engineered a custom physics engine for page interactions using spring-based animations.
Implemented offline-first capabilities using IndexedDB for complete article caching.
Optimized typography rendering for diverse screen sizes and resolutions.
Developed a highly efficient texture simulation system.

challenges.title: Texture Rendering Performance
challenges.solution: Dynamic SVG filters for text texture caused severe performance degradation. Re-architected the rendering approach to use pre-rendered tiled backgrounds with CSS blend modes, eliminating the filter calculation overhead and restoring 60fps scrolling.

inspiration: Focused on delivering a high-fidelity user experience through optimized rendering pipelines and offline-first architecture.

title: Gridlock
summary: A generative application that produces complex geometric patterns based on parameterized rulesets.
vision: Gridlock is a parameter-driven generation engine. It processes user-defined constraints—such as dimension, rotation bounds, and color palettes—to predictably render complex geometric arrays using the Canvas API.
process: Architected a composable rule engine for evaluating shape, color, and density parameters.
Developed a high-performance Canvas rendering pipeline using p5.js.
Implemented high-resolution export functionality for preserving generated output.
Created preset configurations to demonstrate the engine's parameter space.

challenges.title: Unbounded Memory Consumption
challenges.solution: Unconstrained generation resulted in exponential memory allocation. Designed and implemented a viewport-culling algorithm that only computes and renders entities within the visible frustum, dynamically redrawing during transform events.

inspiration: Built to explore parameterized data structures and optimized 2D rendering techniques.
